## Summary                                                  
                                                            
This PR adds glamour as the markdown renderer for PR        
descriptions.                                               
                                                            
## Changes                                                  
                                                            
• Integrated charmbracelet/glamour with the tokyo-night     
style                                                       
• Added a lazy-initializing Renderer wrapper in             
internal/ui/markdown                                        
• Replaced plain wrapParagraph calls in description         
rendering                                                   
                                                            
## Testing                                                  
                                                            
go test ./...                                               
                                                            
│ Note: golden files must be regenerated after bumping the  
│ glamour version.                                          
                                                            
See the glamour docs                                        
https://github.com/charmbracelet/glamour for style options.
